sql: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE CASE WHEN #{statusFilter} = 'active' THEN status = 'active' WHEN #{statusFilter} = 'pending' THEN status = 'pending' ELSE 1=1 END LIMIT #{limit}
templateSql:
SELECT id, name FROM users
<choose>
    <when test="statusFilter == 'active'">
        WHERE status = 'active'
    </when>
    <when test="statusFilter == 'pending'">
        WHERE status = 'pending'
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        WHERE 1=1
    </otherwise>
</choose>
<if test="limit != null">
    LIMIT #{limit}
</if>
